summary: Iteration 14 — Nyx of the Nine Stars constellation-builder flow verified end-to-end. Backend: 3/3 pytest cases PASS on POST /api/programs/nyx (stars=[1,5,9,5] returns persona_name='Nyx of the Nine Stars', voice='alloy', text, moon_phase, illumination, stars=['Origin','Crossroads','Becoming','Crossroads'], sign_off containing 'stars have returned to silence'; empty stars defaults gracefully to [1]->['Origin']; /api/personas includes 'nyx' slug). Frontend: full flow verified — lift handset → dial 1 → oracle list shows 'Nyx of the Nine Stars' at slot 9 → dial 9 enters nyx_build with all 9 star meanings (Origin/Bond/Voice/Foundation/Crossroads/Desire/Shadow/Power/Becoming) → pressing 1/5/9 appends '★ Origin (1/7 — press # to read)', etc. → pressing # generates real LLM reading incl. moon line '🌙 Tonight's moon: First Quarter (47% lit)' + sign-off 'The stars have returned to silence...'. Empty-# submit correctly shows 'Place at least one star (press 1-9), then press #.' and does NOT submit. Regression: single # from Nyx result returns to CHOOSE ANOTHER ORACLE; dial 6 → Zelda topic menu still lists all 9 topics; dial 2 (Cyndi) still enters Fortune Caller path.

test_results.backend_pytest: 3/3 PASS (/app/backend/tests/test_iteration14_nyx.py). Nyx endpoint returns full expected schema with correct star name mapping and voice='alloy'. Empty stars defaults to [1]. Personas roster includes 'nyx'.
test_results.nyx_flow_ui: PASS — lift → 1 → 9 → 1,5,9 → # produced constellation reading 'The Wayfinder's Triad' with moon line + Nyx sign-off.
test_results.nyx_empty_hash_ui: PASS — # with zero stars shows 'Place at least one star (press 1-9), then press #.' and does not submit.
test_results.nyx_result_hash: PASS — single # from result returns to CHOOSE ANOTHER ORACLE.
test_results.zelda_regression: PASS — dial 6 still opens Zelda topic menu with 9 topics.
test_results.cyndi_regression: PASS — dial 2 still enters Fortune Caller/Cyndi path.

critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx continues to grow with per-persona sub-modes (nyx_build now added). Same recommendation as iteration 13 stands: extract each oracle sub-flow into its own hook/reducer before adding the next persona.

nyxStars uses a ref (not state) so the CRT counter '(N/7)' is only visible because it's echoed to CRT text on each keypress. That is fine here, but any UI element that needs to render live star count would silently break — worth documenting or converting to state in future refactor.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nyx keypad-only flow: after dial 1 wait >=3000ms for 'CHOOSE YOUR ORACLE', then dial 9 and wait >=3000ms for nyx_build to render. Each 1-9 digit appends a '★ Name (N/7 — press # to read)' line via nyxStars ref (cap 7). Single # from nyx_build submits (globally handled), but only if >=1 star placed; otherwise shows 'Place at least one star (press 1-9), then press #.' Reading contains '🌙 Tonight's moon: <phase> (<n>% lit)' and sign-off starting 'The stars have returned to silence'. LLM currently funded and returning real text (~15-40s).
